case_title: TRANSAMERICA FINANCIAL SERVICES VS MERCY ZAMORA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,044.35 FILED BY TRANSAMERICA FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY ZAMORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED POS FILED ON PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AS TO MERCY ZAMORA.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRANSAMERICA FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCY ZAMORA $1,044.35 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,094.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY ZAMORA
